source_name: BITRE Yearbook 2025 - domestic freight task by mode
notes: Manual entry from BITRE Australian Infrastructure and Transport Statistics Yearbook 2025, Table 1.1c. The value is Australia's domestic freight task, total bulk and non-bulk, in billion tonne-kilometres. It is not a tonnes measure and does not include international freight movements.
citation: Bureau of Infrastructure and Transport Research Economics, Australian Infrastructure and Transport Statistics Yearbook 2025, freight tables.

fields.coverage: Australian domestic freight task, total bulk and non-bulk
